mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, work_date, check_in, check_out FROM attendance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND work_date >= TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE) AND work_date < TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE) + 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance ( id, user_id, work_date, check_in ) VALUES ( attendance_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, work_date, check_in, check_out FROM attendance WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY work_date DESC
